headline: Scotiabank Comments on Expected Contribution from KeyCorp's Second Quarter Earnings
summary: Scotiabank announced today that the expected net income contribution from its ownership interest in KeyCorp will be approximately CAD $82 million in Q3 2026. This contribution represents the Bank's share of KeyCorp's Q2 2026 net income, includes acquisition-related and other accounting impacts, is net of the Bank's associated funding costs and is reported on a one-month lag.

headline: KeyCorp Analysts Increase Their Forecasts After Upbeat Q2 Earnings
summary: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) beat market estimates with Q2 earnings of 44 cents per share and $1.964 billion in sales. Analysts have raised price targets.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on KeyCorp, Raises Price Target to $25
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Gerard Cassidy   maintains KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $24 to $25.

headline: Jim Cramer Likes Truist, But Prefers This Financial Stock
summary: Jim Cramer prefers KeyCorp over Truist Financial, while Archer Aviation unveils a new platform. Ollie's Bargain has been missing earnings.

headline: Baird Maintains Neutral on KeyCorp, Raises Price Target to $23
summary: Baird  analyst David George   maintains KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $22 to $23.
